connection_id.description: The identifier of the financial institution the account belongs to.

party_name.description: The legal name of the entity which owns the account.

party_address.description: The address associated with the owner or null.

postal_code.description: The postal code of the address.

currency.description: The currency of the internal account. Supports "USD" and "CAD" for fiat, and "USDC", "USDG", and "PYUSD" for stablecoin accounts.

account_type.description: The account type, used to provision the appropriate account at the financial institution.

account_capabilities.description: An array of AccountCapability objects that list the originating abilities of the internal account and any relevant information for them.

vendor_attributes.description: A hash of vendor specific attributes that will be used when creating the account at the vendor specified by the given connection.

parent_account_id.description: The parent internal account of this new account.

counterparty_id.description: The Counterparty associated to this account.

legal_entity_id.description: The LegalEntity associated to this account.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.

external_id.description: An optional user-defined 180 character unique identifier.
